title: PJM Load Forecast Hourly JSON API
description:
PJM hourly load forecast for the next seven days by region and zone.

- Includes all published vintages.
- Published every half hour on the quarter E.g. 1:15 and 1:45
- Includes data for all forecast areas.
- Data available at https://dataminer2.pjm.com/feed/load_frcstd_7_day/definition.
- For more history use `load_forecast_hourly_historical` (note the historical dataset does not contain all the forecast areas as the current dataset does)
